chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.S-93 of 2021. 1. For Orders on CMA No. 3028/2021. 2. For Orders on CMA No. 3029/2021. 3. For hearing of main case. 12-04-2021. Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Buriro, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. -------------- *******-------------- 1. Granted. 2. Granted. 3. Learned AAG being available in court has waived the notice of instant petition. It is stated by him on behalf of official respondents that they have no intention to harass the petitioner. Learned counsel for the petitioner being satisfied with the statement of learned AAG, does not press the instant petition. It is disposed of accordingly. Judge Nasim/Steno
